title: GEAS Task State
description: Task-scoped runtime index. Points to which agent is in flight, which evidence files are expected from it, and how many verify-fix iterations have been consumed. Distinct from the task contract's 'status' field, which is the lifecycle state.

agent_in_flight.description: Agent currently spawned and executing on this task. Null when no agent is in flight.

pending_evidence.description: Evidence file paths expected from the agent currently in flight (e.g. 'evidence/implementer.json').

retry_count.description: Number of verify-fix iterations already consumed on this task.

write_phase.description: Two-phase write state. 'pending' during write, 'committed' after the write has been confirmed.
